items.html: The second phase is simple, since now it returned to being Matei in Keter. At that time, it is not Matei in Hochma, Bina, and Hesed, and Matei in Gevura, not Matei in Tifferet, and Matei in Netzah, not Matei in Hod, and Matei in Yesod, and not Matei in Malchut, and then it repeats as in the beginning.
